result.stdout:
inspect
  View metadata of a generated package

Usage:
  Crossroads [options] inspect

Options:
  --package <package> (REQUIRED)  Specify path to the generated package
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
package
  Create executable package.

Usage:
  Crossroads [options] package

Options:
  -n, --name <name> (REQUIRED)        Set name for rebranding executable
  -c, --command <command> (REQUIRED)  Specify command to run the internal application
  --args <args>                       Add arguments for the internal application
  -l, --location <location>           Set the output file location of the package
  --icon <icon>                       Set icon for the executable package, should be of '.ico' extension
  --version <version>                 Set version for the executable package
  --include <include>                 Include internal resource application to be packaged
  -t, --targetos <targetos>           Set runtime identifier for the executable package
  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
package
  Create executable package.

Usage:
  Crossroads [options] package

Options:
  -n, --name <name> (REQUIRED)        Set name for rebranding executable
  -c, --command <command> (REQUIRED)  Specify command to run the internal application
  --args <args>                       Add arguments for the internal application
  -l, --location <location>           Set the output file location of the package
  --icon <icon>                       Set icon for the executable package, should be of '.ico' extension
  --version <version>                 Set version for the executable package
  --include <include>                 Include internal resource application to be packaged
  -t, --targetos <targetos>           Set runtime identifier for the executable package
  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information
